conflict: Ambulance delay, blood loss, and failing heat force a home delivery under extreme constraints.
consequence: Infant is born alive but critical, Noreen survives hemorrhage, and old marital power terms become untenable.
must_land_beats: Labor starts before viable transport is possible
Keane and Elsie perform urgent improvised birth work
Baby transfer to special unit separates mother and child
objective: Keep Noreen and her premature baby alive during a whiteout labor.
